name: Traptrix Holeutea
name_jp: ホールティアの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蟲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can activate this card the turn it was Set, by discarding 1 Normal Trap. Special Summon this card in Defense Position as a Normal Monster (Plant/EARTH/Level 4/ATK 400/DEF 2400). (This card is NOT treated as a Trap.) You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Traptrix" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use 1 "Traptrix Holeutea" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: You can activate this card the turn it was Set, by discarding 1 Normal Trap. Special Summon this card in Defense Position as a Normal Monster (Plant/EARTH/Level 4/ATK 400/DEF 2400). (This card is NOT treated as a Trap.) You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Traptrix" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use 1 "Traptrix Holeutea" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

mst: Can be activated the turn it was Set
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
